title: Paid booked invoice totals GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of the totals of paid booked invoices.

netAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The total invoice amount for all booked and paid invoices in the base currency of the agreement before all taxes and discounts have been applied.

invoiceCount.description: The number of paid booked invoices.

maxDate.description: The latest date of any paid and booked invoice.

minDate.description: The earliest date of any paid and booked invoice.

customers.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked paid customer resource.

accountingYears.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked paid accounting years resource.

periods.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked paid periods resource.

employees.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked paid employees resource.

self.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked paid resource.
